name: Medkit
description:
★ Past Medkit!! This is before he lost his eye and still works at Blackrock together with Tripmine (Subspace) ★

//The fact that I only made this because I got inspired by a Wattpad story makes me wanna cry-//

- Credits go out to that person who wrote the story.

Also for anyone that's interested in it, it's called "Subspace's VHS tapes"

Oh yeah and you're in Tripmine's POV

I'm gonna keep updating him every now and then. ★
